returns._0: string memory - The description of the aggregator.

getRoundData(uint80).details: This function should raise "No data present" if no data is available for the given round ID.

params._roundId: - The round ID to get the data for.

returns.answeredInRound: - The round ID in which the answer was computed.
returns.startedAt: - The timestamp when the round started.
returns.updatedAt: - The timestamp when the round was updated.

latestRoundData().details: This function should raise "No data present" if no data is available.

returns.answeredInRound: - The round ID in which the latest answer was computed.
returns.startedAt: - The timestamp when the latest round started.
returns.updatedAt: - The timestamp when the latest round was updated.

returns._0: uint256 - The version of the aggregator.

decimals().notice: Gets the number of decimals used by the aggregator.

description().notice: Gets the description of the aggregator.

getRoundData(uint80).notice: Gets the round data for a specific round ID.

version().notice: Gets the version of the aggregator.
